title: BEM-866 processor failure marker
objective:
Run script:
"""
hb = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md')
text = hb.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if hb.exists() else ''
if 'PROCESSOR_FAILED' in text:
    status = 'PROCESSOR_FAILED'
elif 'Status_after: FINISHED' in text:
    status = 'PROCESSOR_FINISHED_NO_EFFECT'
elif hb.exists():
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_INCOMPLETE'
else:
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_PROCESSOR_FAILURE_MARKER_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 processor failure marker\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nHeartbeat text:\n' + text[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('processor failure marker: ' + status)
"""
